message:
test(pt-core,pt-config): expand no-mock coverage for exit_codes, martingale_gates, priors

exit_codes.rs: 0→44 tests (all variants, classification helpers, Display, serde)
martingale_gates.rs: 2→31 tests (config, AlphaSource, fdr_method_from_policy, resolve_alpha, apply gates, errors)
priors.rs: 1→58 tests (BetaParams math/validation, GammaParams, Priors loading/class_prior, all sub-type serde)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
